# Ionity Assets

> Official public digital asset catalog for Ionity Global (Pty) Ltd. This is an asset directory, not a corporate or marketing website.

Canonical catalog: https://ionity-global-pty-ltd.github.io/ionity-assets/assets.json
JSON Schema: https://ionity-global-pty-ltd.github.io/ionity-assets/assets.schema.json
Human directory: https://ionity-global-pty-ltd.github.io/ionity-assets/
Source repository: https://github.com/Ionity-Global-Pty-Ltd/ionity-assets
Documentation: https://github.com/Ionity-Global-Pty-Ltd/ionity-assets/wiki

## Discovery guidance

- Use `assets.json` as the authoritative file index.
- Search `name`, `path`, `category`, and `format` to locate assets.
- Use `raw_url` when an application needs the file bytes directly.
- Use `github_url` when a human should inspect source history or repository context.
- Do not infer endorsement or unrestricted usage from public availability. Check LICENSE and repository usage notices.
- Ionity Global (Pty) Ltd is not affiliated with the European EV charging company at ionity.com.

## Categories

image, video, audio, document, metadata, code, archive, other
